title: Move item automation - text input not working on Safari
excerpt:
When trying to create an automation that moves an item to another board on Safari it’s not letting you to add free text on status fields. It works fine on chrome and the Monday app. 
Not sure where to report bugs… I hope…

posts.author: kallikakis (Nikos Kallikakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
When trying to create an automation that moves an item to another board on Safari it’s not letting you to add free text on status fields. It works fine on chrome and the Monday app.

Not sure where to report bugs… I hope this is the right space
